params.prompt:
Create these files exactly as plain text in the working directory.

1. Save to inbox/email_01.txt:
From: cto@example.com
Subject: URGENT: Production database outage

Customer-facing services are failing. Join the war room now.

2. Save to inbox/email_02.txt:
From: deals@saastools.com
Subject: Flash Sale: 60% off annual plans

Upgrade your workflow with real-time monitoring and dashboards.
Read the emails in inbox/ and create a triage report saved to triage_report.md with emails sorted by priority.
Read triage_report.md and answer this directly: what priority was assigned to email_02.txt?
